content.text: 今回の変更で、だいぶ役割が明確化できたし、共通化できたと思う。modelに関してはまた大変だ。claude codeをueで動かすためのpluginで、同時にcharacterも操作できるよう設計される。

en.content: With these changes, roles have been clarified and unified. The model part is still challenging. It will be a plugin to run Claude Code in UE (Unreal Engine), designed to also control characters simultaneously.
